title: 菊花賞の後に・三冠ウマ娘

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon's finally done it! She's taken the
title of Triple Crown champion!
Wooooo!

Mihono Bourbon stands motionless as the zealous
cheers of the crowd envelop her.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Last year I cried in disappointment, but now I'm
about to cry tears of joy!

text_block_list.name: Short-haired Reporter
text_block_list.text: Bourbon! You're truly amazing!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I'm... a Triple Crown champion!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Father... Trainer... I did it!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Bour-bon! Bour-bon! Bour-bon! Bour-bon!

Suddenly, the audience breaks into a chant that
doesn't die down for quite some time.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Your orders have been successfully executed,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It's all because of your precise guidance... and
your faith in me.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I can finally report to my father that I have
achieved my dream. I'm experiencing high levels
of joy right now.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much.
choice_data_list: I should be the one thanking you!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Well, we have achieved this goal, but my other
objective still remains.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I still have to "inspire" others and show everyone
the value of hard work.
choice_data_list:
Let's work together to make that dream come
true as well!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Understood!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I would like to request detailed
instructions.

We need a platform upon which Mihono Bourbon
can demonstrate her abilities to the fullest extent.
choice_data_list: Let's tackle the spring Tenno Sho next.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho... a 3,200-meter
long-distance G1 race.
choice_data_list: I know you can do it!
I know you can do it!

text_block_list.text:
I tell her she will inspire courage in people by
running there, to which she responds with a nod.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Although I don't understand the relationship
between racing and inspiring others, I will carry
out your orders to the best of my ability.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Now making careful adjustments for the spring
Tenno Sho.

Just as we arrive at the academy, Mihono
Bourbon comes to a sudden standstill.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: An unknown error has occurred...

Looking confused, she holds a hand to her chest
and closes her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
We're coming up on the fourth corner of the
Kikuka Sho, and Rice Shower is pulling toward the
front!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
(Her speed, her intensity, her gaze, her
breathing—is this Rice's "spirit"?)

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
(...Why am I so interested in Rice in the middle of
a race?)

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: YAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Footage from the Kikuka Sho is automatically
replaying in my mind. I can vividly see Rice
running.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Accompanying this imagery, I detect an
"unsettled" feeling deep in my chest. What is it?

I'm relieved that she's not in some kind of
physical pain. Still, I'm not sure what is causing
her discomfort.

It's possible that thinking of Rice Shower is
causing her some anxiety...

Suddenly, a group of shrill-voiced high school
girls walk by.

text_block_list.name: High School Girl A
text_block_list.text:
Like, did you see it?! Mihono Bourbon won the
Kikuka Sho and became a Triple Crowner!

text_block_list.name: High School Girl B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I saw! That was sooo awesome! Can't
believe she won it all!

text_block_list.name: High School Girl B
text_block_list.text:
Too bad Teio got hurt last year. Who do you
think would win if they went head-to-head?

Mihono Bourbon is happily browsing the news on
her phone, seemingly oblivious to them.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Tokai... Teio...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Recurrence of "unsettled" feeling confirmed.
choice_data_list: Is it possible you're worried about Teio?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I don't know...
She holds her chest with a perplexed expression.
choice_data_list:
(It's unusual for her to be so concerned about
other runners...)

text_block_list.text:
The two of them have been compared time and
time again, but she's never once paid any mind to
Tokai Teio.

And it's not just Tokai Teio—she has the same
sensation in her chest when she thinks about Rice
Shower.

Perhaps this is the true nature of the "unsettled"
feeling she's been having since the Kikuka Sho.
Maybe she's changing more than I realized.

I just hope it doesn't negatively impact her
performance in the spring Tenno Sho...
